name: Mobile legends: "The Aspirants"
description:
In a world of absolute peace, they are the only shield against the unknown. Welcome to Neo-Singapore, protected by an elite squad of the Global Aspirant Defense Network.

​Meet the team: The stoic Commander Lesley, the fiery and impulsive Fanny (watch out for her blades!), the silent genius Ruby, the sleepy but lethal Layla, and the chaotic duo of Chang’e and Angela.

​From "Green" glitches to "Ender" class extinctions—how will you fit into their morning routine? Are you a new hero, a civilian caught in the crossfire, or the very threat they were trained to eliminate? Science is their weapon. Survival is the goal
creator: ZeroQuenn
